title: Reading the Bass Clef
description: Learn the letter names of the lines and spaces for the Bass Clef (F Clef).

lessons.title: Good Boys Do Fine Always
lessons.description: Learn the notes on the five lines of the Bass Clef.
lessons.prompt: Teach the notes on the lines of the Bass Clef: G, B, D, F, A. Explain common mnemonics. Provide interactive exercises that present these line notes randomly and ask the user to play them.

lessons.title: All Cows Eat Grass
lessons.description: Learn the notes in the four spaces of the Bass Clef.
lessons.prompt: Teach the notes in the spaces of the Bass Clef: A, C, E, G. Explain common mnemonics like 'All Cows Eat Grass'. Provide interactive exercises that present space notes randomly for the user to play.

lessons.title: Bass Clef Mastery
lessons.prompt: Combine Bass Clef line and space notes. Provide exercises with melodic fragments spanning from G2 to A3. Focus on step-wise motion and small skips.
